stats.title: 📊 Statistics
stats.weakWordsInfoText: The list is sorted by number of mistakes (✗) — words you've forgotten most often appear first. When mistake counts tie, EF (Ease Factor) breaks the tie — it starts at 2.50 and drops after every wrong answer (floor 1.30). The lower the EF, the harder the word is for you, and the longer it stays in your review queue.

scramble.prompt: Build the word from the letters:
story.pickerDesc: Choose a text to read. Words from your dictionary are highlighted — click to see the translation.
reading.title: 📖 Reading
hints.quiz: 🧠 Quiz: pick the correct translation from 4 options. Keys 1–4 for quick selection.
hints.write: ✍️ Write: type the translation in English. 💡 — hint, 🎤 — voice input.
hints.listen: 🔊 Listening: press ▶ to hear the word, then pick the translation. Space = repeat.
hints.fib: ✏️ Sentences: type the missing word in the sentence. Enter — submit, 💡 — hint.
hints.tempo: ⚡ Tempo: answer as fast as you can before the timer ends. Keys 1–4 to select.
hints.lesson: 📚 Lesson: 3 phases — flashcards, quiz, writing. Complete all 5 words to finish.
hints.daily: 📅 Daily mission: 10 words with a 2-minute timer. Bonus XP for every correct answer!
hints.reading: 📖 Reading: colored words are not yet learned. Click a word to see its translation.
hints.ytPlayer: 🎬 YouTube: paste a video link, upload subtitles (.srt/.vtt) and click any word for its translation.
hints.scramble: 🔀 Scramble: arrange the shuffled letters to form the correct word. Enter to confirm, 💡 for a hint.
hints.letters: 🔤 Letters: type all the letters in the correct order. One attempt per letter.
keys.title: ⌨️ Keyboard shortcuts

settings.voiceDesc: Free, no API key, instant. Audio is cached after the first playback.
settings.imagesDesc1: A free Pixabay key provides photos for ~90% of words.
settings.prefetchDesc: Pre-load image URLs for all words in the background — afterwards, pictures will appear instantly.
settings.backupDesc: Export your progress before updating the file — so you don’t lose learned words.
settings.notifDesc: A daily reminder if you haven’t studied yet today.
settings.pwaDesc: Quick access from your home screen, works offline.
settings.pwaAddressBarHint: Use the install icon (⊕) in your browser’s address bar, or the ⋮ menu → “Install Vymova…”.
settings.cloudHintLine1: Save your key — you’ll need it to restore.
settings.cloudHintLine2: Data is only accessible with the key.
settings.bugDesc: Found a bug or have a suggestion?
settings.dangerDesc: Irreversible action — all learned words, your streak, and achievements will be deleted.
settings.pixabayKeySaved: ✅ Key saved. New words will get photos automatically.
settings.pixabayNoKey: No key set — only Wikipedia is used.
settings.notifBlocked: ❌ Blocked — allow it in your browser
settings.notifGrantedOff: Permission granted, but notifications are off
settings.cloudRestoreConfirm: Your current progress will be replaced with data from the cloud. Continue?
settings.voicesNotFound: No voices found. Try refreshing the page.
settings.noUkVoicesDesc:
To hear UA→EN cards spoken, install a Ukrainian TTS voice.
Windows: Settings → Time & Language → Speech → "Polina" or "Ostap"
settings.noEsVoicesDesc:
To hear Spanish cards spoken, install a Spanish TTS voice.
Windows: Settings → Time & Language → Speech → "Helena" or "Pablo"
settings.noFrVoicesDesc:
To hear French cards spoken, install a French TTS voice.
Windows: Settings → Time & Language → Speech → "Henri" or "Denise"
settings.noItVoicesDesc:
To hear Italian cards spoken, install an Italian TTS voice.
Windows: Settings → Time & Language → Speech → "Elsa" or "Diego"
settings.noPtVoicesDesc:
To hear Portuguese cards spoken, install a Portuguese TTS voice.
Windows: Settings → Time & Language → Speech → "Raquel" or "Duarte"
settings.noDeVoicesDesc:
To hear German cards spoken, install a German TTS voice.
Windows: Settings → Time & Language → Speech → "Katja" or "Conrad"
settings.noHeVoicesDesc:
To hear Hebrew cards spoken, install a Hebrew TTS voice.
Windows: Settings → Time & Language → Speech → "Hila" or "Avri"
settings.noArVoicesDesc:
To hear Arabic cards spoken, install an Arabic TTS voice.
Windows: Settings → Time & Language → Speech → "Salma" or "Hamed"
settings.noPlVoicesDesc:
To hear Polish cards spoken, install a Polish TTS voice.
Windows: Settings → Time & Language → Speech → "Zofia" or "Marek"
settings.noZhVoicesDesc:
To hear Chinese cards spoken, install a Chinese TTS voice.
Windows: Settings → Time & Language → Speech → "Xiaoxiao" or "Yunxi"
settings.noElVoicesDesc:
To hear Greek cards spoken, install a Greek TTS voice.
Windows: Settings → Time & Language → Speech → "Athina" or "Nestoras"
settings.noJaVoicesDesc:
To hear Japanese cards spoken, install a Japanese TTS voice.
Windows: Settings → Time & Language → Speech → "Nanami" or "Keita"
settings.noTrVoicesDesc:
To hear Turkish cards spoken, install a Turkish TTS voice.
Windows: Settings → Time & Language → Speech → "Emel" or "Ahmet"
settings.noNlVoicesDesc:
To hear Dutch cards spoken, install a Dutch TTS voice.
Windows: Settings → Time & Language → Speech → "Fenna" or "Maarten"

duel.hint.info.title: 💡 Hints in Write mode
duel.hint.info.p1: During a duel in Write mode, you can peek at the first third of the word.
duel.hint.info.ul: Unlimited — as many hints as you want
duel.hint.info.3: 3 hints — can peek 3 times per game
duel.pu.info.title: 🎯 Power-ups — special abilities
duel.pu.info.desc: Each player gets 1 of each type per game. Use them at the right moment!
duel.pu.double.info: The next correct answer gives 2 points instead of 1. Activate before a hard question!
duel.pu.skip.info: Skip the current question without penalty. Score won't change.
duel.pu.freeze.info: Stops the opponent's timer for 5 seconds. Available only in Tempo mode — inactive in other modes.
modal.exportSub: Select all the text and copy it. Save it in your notes or send it to yourself.
modal.importSub: Paste the progress code you copied earlier via “Export”
modal.importInvalid: ❌ Invalid code — check that you copied it in full
modal.resetWarn: Learned words, your streak, daily goal, and achievements will be permanently deleted.
modal.imgClearWarn: All downloaded photos will be removed from the cache. Images will be re-downloaded as you browse cards.
idioms.notAvailable: Idioms for this language pair are not available yet
export.noWordsAlert: No words to export. Change the filter.
share.title: Vymova — my progress
ob.slide1.title: Welcome!
ob.slide1.html:
This is your personal trainer for learning English vocabulary. There are {{n}} words with examples, pronunciation, and translations.

Learn a little every day — progress won't keep you waiting!
ob.slide2.title: How to learn words
ob.slide2.html: The card shows a word. Think, then tap to see the translation.
ob.slide2.tip1: Know — the word goes into the spaced-repetition system
ob.slide2.tip2: Next — skip it, you'll see it again
ob.slide2.tip3: Swipe up — show the translation right away
ob.slide3.title: 10 learning modes
ob.slide3.html: Besides flashcards, there are many ways to practice:
ob.slide4.title: Where shall we start?
ob.slide4.html: How would you like to start? Pick an approach — you can always change it in the filter.

ob.level.srs.words: the system picks words for you
